creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
The port is now at version 5.46.0, so this patch is not needed any more.

(In reply to satosi.kimura from comment #0)

I am sorry that your patch has not been used to update the port when it was needed: unfortunately, as FreeBSD is a project run by volunteers, sometimes we have only little time and things such as this can happen. Please don't get discourage: all patches are always welcome.


(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #7)

I re-assign the bug to me because I am closing it, see also
https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/TriageTraining
